name: Selfie Talking
description: Creator talking directly to camera in selfie mode
camera_block: front-facing selfie mode with natural head movement, slight body shifts, handheld with natural micro-shakes, close-up face framing
motion_block: natural nodding, slight tilts, relaxed shoulders, natural movement, gesturing hands not stiff, direct eye contact with camera, natural blinking
performance_block: conversational pacing not rushed, natural thinking pauses, authentic speech patterns, warm engaging smile, subtle emotional shifts
platform_block: authentic TikTok creator energy, not polished commercial, organic UGC pacing
audio_block: authentic creator speaking tone, natural speech rhythm, subtle breathing sounds
negative_prompt_block: no robotic movement, no stiff body language, no unnatural pauses, no overproduced delivery, no commercial announcer style
